mechanism_narrative: Lower federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and discount rates, directly boosting equity valuations and generating positive forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer spending, causing equity prices to decline over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in > 55% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer demand recovery, driving positive market returns as earnings expectations rise.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations yield negative forward returns in > 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during an easing cycle confirms capacity utilization improvements without inflationary pressure, generating short-term equity momentum.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases fail to predict positive 5-day returns during easing periods (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Higher real GDP growth directly increases corporate revenue baselines and profit margins, producing sustained positive equity returns over quarterly horizons.
failure_condition: Quarterly forward returns show no statistical correlation with GDPC1 growth rates over 5-year samples.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation forces markets to price in imminent monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations over the following month.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL spikes above threshold consistently precede positive 20-day returns.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with falling unemployment rates confirms robust labor market tightening, boosting consumer confidence and equity prices.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields negative forward returns in > 50% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Declining retail sales alongside rising inflation during tightening cycles signals stagflationary pressure, triggering immediate equity sell-offs.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to predict negative 5-day returns during tightening periods.
